synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19540 Oracle Linux 9 linux-firmware bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19540
full_text:

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19540.html
